title: Git: Repository Setup & Push Guidelines
description: Yangi git repozitoriy yaratilishi va origin serverga ulanishi yoki mavjud repozitoriyning push qilinishi.
code:
Quick setup — if you’ve done this kind of thing before
or	https://github.com/okhmadjonov/demoapp.git
Get started by creating a new file or uploading an existing file. We recommend every repository include a README, LICENSE, and .gitignore.

…or create a new repository on the command line
echo "# demoapp" >> README.md
git init
git add README.md
git commit -m "first commit"
git branch -M master
git remote add origin https://github.com/okhmadjonov/demoapp.git
git push -u origin master

…or push an existing repository from the command line
git remote add origin https://github.com/okhmadjonov/demoapp.git
git branch -M master
git push -u origin master

title: Docker: Beginner Step-by-Step Guide & Compose Settings
description: Docker loyihasini Dockerfile va Docker Compose yordamida sozlash hamda konteynerlarni boshqarish bo'yicha boshlang'ich qo'llanma.
code:
# 1-qadam: Ilova uchun Dockerfile yaratish
FROM node:18-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["npm", "start"]

# 2-qadam: docker-compose.yml faylini yaratish (Konteynerlarni birga ishga tushirish)
version: '3.8'
services:
  web:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    volumes:
      - .:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=development
    depends_on:
      - db

  db:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    restart: always
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: devuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: devpassword
      POSTGRES_DB: devdb
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  pgdata:

# 3-qadam: Loyihani ishga tushirish buyruqlari
# Konteynerlarni fonda ishga tushirish:
docker compose up -d

# Konteynerlarni to'xtatish va o'chirish:
docker compose down

title: Database: Basic SQL & PostgreSQL CRUD Queries
description: SQL ma'lumotlar bazasida jadval yaratish, ma'lumot qo'shish, o'qish, tahrirlash va birlashtirish (JOIN) buyruqlari.
code:
-- 1. Jadval yaratish (Create Table)
CREATE TABLE users (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 2. Ma'lumot qo'shish (Insert)
INSERT INTO users (username, email) 
VALUES ('dev_user', 'dev@example.com');

-- 3. Ma'lumotni o'qish (Select & Join)
SELECT users.id, users.username, profiles.bio 
FROM users
INNER JOIN profiles ON users.id = profiles.user_id;

-- 4. Ma'lumotni yangilash (Update)
UPDATE users 
SET email = 'new_email@example.com' 
WHERE id = 1;

-- 5. Ma'lumotni o'chirish (Delete)
DELETE FROM users 
WHERE id = 1;

title: Database: Mongoose Schema Model (MongoDB)
description: MongoDB uchun Mongoose yordamida validation va pre-save hashingga ega User modelini yaratish.

title: Other: Professional README.md Template
description: Har qanday GitHub loyihasi uchun standart, professional README.md shabloni.
code:
# 🚀 Project Title

Short description of what this project does and who it's for.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React, TypeScript, SCSS
- **State Management:** Redux, Rematch
- **Styling:** CSS Modules, Ant Design

## 📦 Installation

Clone the repository and install the dependencies:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/username/project.git
cd project
npm install
```

## 🚀 Running the App

Start the development server:

```bash
npm run dev
```

Build the production bundle:

```bash
npm run build
```

## 📄 License

This project is licensed under the MIT License.
